project_type: Mobile game (Expo/React Native) + Node.js multiplayer server
build_system: npm + expo prebuild + gradle (mobile), npm + tsx (server), Docker (server image)
test_framework: No tests (user explicitly requested no test files)
build_command: cd server && npm install && npx tsc --noEmit (server typecheck); cd MemKarti-cloud/apps/mobile-v2 && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npx tsc --noEmit (app typecheck)
test_command: No test command - user said no tests
verification_instructions: 1. Server typecheck: cd server && npx tsc --noEmit. 2. App typecheck: cd MemKarti-cloud/apps/mobile-v2 && npx tsc --noEmit. 3. Docker build: docker build -f server/Dockerfile -t memkarti-server . (from repo root). 4. Server starts: cd server && timeout 5 npm start || true (check no crash).
setup_instructions: cd server && npm install; cd MemKarti-cloud/apps/mobile-v2 && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Bunny API key: f1f950f7-f184-4bda-934b-2e70d757c7333fa59c9f-1ab4-490f-8f91-ae8ba0455f19. Server deployed on Bunny Magic Containers at https://mc-8p1wswn5c6.bunny.run. CI triggers: push to release-v2 builds APK, push to feature/bunny-container builds server image. No test files allowed per user request.
contribution_requirements: No test files. User communicates in Russian/Ukrainian. Server imports game engine via relative paths from ../../MemKarti-cloud/apps/mobile-v2/src/game/. Shared code must be pure (no React Native deps). app.json runtimeVersion must be bumped only when native modules change.
key_patterns: Game engine is pure functions in src/game/lanGame.ts, imported by both app and server. Server re-exports engine via src/engine.ts. deck.ts has hardcoded MEME_CARDS and SITUATIONS arrays. Server uses JSONL files on persistent volume at /data for storage. Mobile uses expo-router with screens in src/app/. Components in src/components/. Config in src/config.ts. All Socket.IO events defined in server/src/index.ts.
directory_structure: Root: server/ (Node.js server), MemKarti-cloud/apps/mobile-v2/ (Expo app), deploy/bunny/ (Bunny config), .github/workflows/ (CI). Server imports engine from app via relative path. Docker builds from repo root.
